title: cakile lanceolata var. edentula
intro: Cakile lanceolata var. edentula, also known as Sea Rocket, is a coastal plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, due to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates and glucosinolates. The health benefits of Sea Rocket include its potential to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and stems can be consumed raw or dried for medicinal purposes.
